FRAUDULENT.label: Fraudulent
weakEvidenceWarnings: Order data alone is usually weak without account-access or identity consistency signals.
Missing delivery or account-usage linkage often reduces reviewer confidence.
priorityActions: Attach billing and shipping consistency evidence (address, IP/device or account history).
Attach fulfillment or service-access records tied to the disputed order.

UNRECOGNIZED.label: Unrecognized
weakEvidenceWarnings: Receipts without customer-identifying context are frequently treated as weak.
Lack of communication context can make cardholder recognition harder to establish.
priorityActions: Attach order details and customer identifiers that connect the order to the cardholder.
Attach relevant communication proving customer awareness of the purchase.

PRODUCT_NOT_RECEIVED.label: Product not received
weakEvidenceWarnings: Tracking-only screenshots without delivery status and address match are often insufficient.
No timeline between shipment and customer contact can weaken the rebuttal.
priorityActions: Attach carrier delivery confirmation with timestamp and destination details.
Attach customer communication showing delivery or post-delivery support.

PRODUCT_UNACCEPTABLE.label: Product unacceptable / not as described
weakEvidenceWarnings: Policy excerpts without purchase-time product details are usually weak.
Missing communication history around complaints or remediation reduces clarity.
priorityActions: Attach product details shown at purchase time plus order receipt.
Attach complaint-response and refund/cancellation communication timeline.

CREDIT_NOT_PROCESSED.label: Credit not processed
weakEvidenceWarnings: Refund claim responses are weak when refund timeline evidence is missing.
Statements about policy without transaction-level refund artifacts are often insufficient.
priorityActions: Attach refund request, processing date, and credit handling evidence.
Attach policy terms and customer communication confirming refund handling.

SUBSCRIPTION_CANCELED.label: Subscription canceled
weakEvidenceWarnings: No timestamped cancellation or renewal notice evidence is a common weakness.
Policy text without account event logs often fails to prove cancellation handling.
priorityActions: Attach cancellation policy plus renewal/cancellation communication timeline.
Attach account-level cancellation and usage events around the disputed period.

DUPLICATE.label: Duplicate
weakEvidenceWarnings: Multiple transaction records without clear differentiation can appear inconsistent.
Missing customer context for each charge weakens duplicate-charge rebuttals.
priorityActions: Attach transaction records that clearly differentiate each charge or order.
Attach customer communication confirming separate purchases or services.

GENERAL.label: General
weakEvidenceWarnings: General disputes are often weak when narrative and evidence links are vague.
Missing communication records can make reviewer reconstruction difficult.
priorityActions: Attach a concise timeline linking each evidence file to a factual claim.
Prioritize order proof, policy terms, and dispute-relevant communication.

STRIPE:FRAUDULENT.label: Stripe - Fraudulent
weakEvidenceWarnings: Stripe fraud responses are weak when authorization context (customer/account linkage) is missing.
priorityActions: Include evidence that the cardholder participated in or benefited from the transaction.

STRIPE:PRODUCT_NOT_RECEIVED.label: Stripe - Product not received
weakEvidenceWarnings: Stripe INR responses are weak when carrier confirmation and address linkage are incomplete.
priorityActions: Prioritize delivery confirmation and customer communication tied to shipment.

STRIPE:SUBSCRIPTION_CANCELED.label: Stripe - Subscription canceled
weakEvidenceWarnings: Missing cancellation event logs and policy alignment is a frequent weakness.
priorityActions: Attach cancellation logs and renewal/cancellation notice records.

SHOPIFY:FRAUDULENT.label: Shopify - Fraudulent
weakEvidenceWarnings: Shopify fraud responses are weak when identity/location and delivery linkage are incomplete.
priorityActions: Include customer-location consistency and fulfillment evidence in one coherent timeline.

SHOPIFY:PRODUCT_NOT_RECEIVED.label: Shopify - Product not received
weakEvidenceWarnings: Shopify INR responses are weak when shipping address match and delivery attempt data are missing.
priorityActions: Include carrier tracking, delivery proof, and customer communication in chronological order.

SHOPIFY:PRODUCT_UNACCEPTABLE.label: Shopify - Product unacceptable
weakEvidenceWarnings: Without policy and complaint-resolution trail, product-quality disputes are hard to rebut.
priorityActions: Attach product description at purchase time and complaint/refund handling evidence.

SHOPIFY:CREDIT_NOT_PROCESSED.label: Shopify - Credit not processed
weakEvidenceWarnings: Refund disputes remain weak when refund processing timestamps are absent.
priorityActions: Attach refund request and processing events with customer communications.

SHOPIFY:SUBSCRIPTION_CANCELED.label: Shopify - Subscription canceled
weakEvidenceWarnings: No cancellation evidence and renewal notice trail is a common failure point.
priorityActions: Attach subscription terms, cancellation confirmation, and service timeline.

SHOPIFY:DUPLICATE.label: Shopify - Duplicate
weakEvidenceWarnings: Duplicate disputes are weak when separate charges are not clearly distinguished.
priorityActions: Attach records proving why charges are distinct or already resolved.
